blocks.content: The phone rang at nine-fifteen. Kit's mom called upstairs that it was Eli, and Kit came down and took the receiver to the corner of the kitchen where the cord stretched.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Okay hold on Savannah's getting on.
A click, some static, and then Savannah's voice.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Okay. Kit. What is happening with you and Daisy.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: She didn't sit with you at lunch.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Kit. You told her about the water tower thing with Brooke.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: The water tower is yours and Daisy's thing.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Kit. I say this with love. You are genuinely the least self-aware person I know.
He hung up. Stood in the kitchen for a second. The water tower is yours and Daisy's thing. He went back upstairs and didn't go back on AIM.
